'''rashaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacationship|vacationship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacationship|vacationship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rashaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræshæjæth|ræshæjæth]] || [[word:ræshæjæj|ræshæjæj]] || [[word:ræshæjæsh|ræshæjæsh]] || [[word:ræshæjæ|ræshæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rashashajath|rashashajath]] || [[word:rashashajaj|rashashajaj]] || [[word:rashashajash|rashashajash]] || [[word:rashashaja|rashashaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rashajath|rashajath]] || [[word:rashajaj|rashajaj]] || [[word:rashajash|rashajash]] || [[word:rashaja|rashaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rashafjath|rashafjath]] || [[word:rashafjaj|rashafjaj]] || [[word:rashafjash|rashafjash]] || [[word:rashafjaf|rashafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rashajatha|rashajatha]] || [[word:rashajaja|rashajaja]] || [[word:rashajasha|rashajasha]] || [[word:rashajaka|rashajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rashajath|rashajath]] || [[word:rashajaj|rashajaj]] || [[word:rashajash|rashajash]] || [[word:rashaja|rashaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rashajathal|rashajathal]] || [[word:rashajajal|rashajajal]] || [[word:rashajashal|rashajashal]] || [[word:rashajakal|rashajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rashajathatha|rashajathatha]] || [[word:rashajajaja|rashajajaja]] || [[word:rashajashasha|rashajashasha]] || [[word:rashajaka|rashajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rashajathan|rashajathan]] || [[word:rashajajan|rashajajan]] || [[word:rashajashan|rashajashan]] || [[word:rashajakan|rashajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rashajathaoro|rashajathaoro]] || [[word:rashajajaoro|rashajajaoro]] || [[word:rashajashaoro|rashajashaoro]] || [[word:rashajakaoro|rashajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
